title: 5 traits of a man who leads like Christ
caption:
Most men want to lead.

Few want to go first.

Real leadership doesn't start with authority. It starts with cost. Christ didn't lead from the back of the room giving orders — he went to the cross. The man worth following paid before he asked anyone to move.

Here's what that actually looks like:

He absorbs the cost first. He leads himself before anyone else. He speaks last. He's hard on sin and patient with souls. And he always points past himself.

"He must become greater. I must become less." — John 3:30.

That's the man God trusts.

—

Comment "lead" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

#ethos #christianmen #faithoverfear #godlymen #manofgod #leadership #disciplineequalsfreedom #masculinity #christianity #scripture
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
